nodes.name: Docker Management Scripts
nodes.summary: Docker management scripts reference covering core commands (docker-up, docker-down, docker-logs, docker-health, docker-status), usage examples, troubleshooting, and configuration for the Python worker container

nodes.name: Deployment Guide
nodes.summary: Comprehensive deployment guide covering pre-deployment checklist, platform options (Vercel, Netlify, self-hosted/Docker), database migration, environment variables, CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions, domain configuration, SSL/TLS, troubleshooting, and rollback strategy

nodes.name: Deployment Runbook
nodes.summary: Operational runbook detailing pre-deployment checks, deployment steps for frontend and Python worker, post-deployment verification, rollback procedures, environment variable checklist, and common issue troubleshooting

nodes.name: Git Workflow
nodes.summary: Git workflow conventions covering branch naming, commit message format, pull request process, review workflow, common commands, and best practices

nodes.name: Contributing Guide
nodes.summary: Contributing guide covering code of conduct, development process, coding standards for TypeScript and React, file organization, styling, commit guidelines, pull request process, issue guidelines, and community information

nodes.name: Commands Reference
nodes.summary: Reference for core npm commands, testing commands, build commands, utility commands, git commands, Supabase CLI commands, Python worker commands, Docker commands, and command aliases

nodes.name: Environment Variables Reference
nodes.summary: Reference for required and optional environment variables including Supabase configuration, AI provider system, feature flags, development vs production variables, security notes, setup guide, troubleshooting, and variable usage by location

nodes.name: Troubleshooting Guide
nodes.summary: Troubleshooting guide covering installation issues, development issues, database issues, authentication issues, build issues, and performance issues

nodes.name: Database Seeding Quick Reference
nodes.summary: Quick reference for database seeding commands, all flags (module, override, control), common workflows, environment variables, Python worker, data verification, and troubleshooting

nodes.name: Database Seeding Guide
nodes.summary: Comprehensive database seeding guide covering quick start, configuration, commands and flags, seeding modules (Profiles, Posts, Connections, Matches, Conversations, Messages, Notifications, Mentor, Embeddings), environment variables reference, troubleshooting, data verification, best practices, and advanced usage

nodes.name: Collabryx Design System
nodes.summary: Design system documentation covering glass variants system, design tokens (color, brand colors), arbitrary Tailwind values usage, component standards (dialog, button, card), border radius standards, shadow system, and audit checklist

nodes.name: Frontend Integration Guide
nodes.summary: Frontend integration guide for implemented API endpoints including content moderation, AI mentor, and daily analytics, with integration points, UI components to create, testing checklist, deployment notes, and success metrics

nodes.name: Implementation Plan
nodes.summary: Implementation plan covering architecture diagrams, task prioritization for RAG context injection, MiniMax provider integration, semantic similarity fix, hybrid search implementation, streaming UI, session summarization, cross-encoder re-ranking, testing strategy, and dependency graph

nodes.name: Security Overview
nodes.summary: Security documentation covering security layers, bot detection, CSRF protection, security headers, rate limiting, input validation with Zod schemas, database security with RLS, best practices, security checklist, monitoring and alerts, and incident response

nodes.name: Python Worker Security Guide
nodes.summary: Security guide for the Python worker covering credential rotation, container security, network security, secret management, file security status, security checklist, incident response, and security score history

nodes.name: Collabryx README
nodes.summary: Project overview, key features, tech stack, quick start guide, project structure, available scripts, testing information, documentation links, contributing guidelines, environment variables, database information, and license

nodes.name: Database Seeder README
nodes.summary: Documentation for the interactive database seeder CLI covering quick start, interactive menu controls, features, available modules, configuration, Python worker for embeddings, incremental seeding, testing, and troubleshooting

nodes.name: Database Setup README
nodes.summary: Database setup documentation covering quick start, master migration file, bulletproof features, schema with 34 tables, verification steps, usage patterns, and troubleshooting

nodes.name: Test Suite README
nodes.summary: Test suite documentation covering test structure, 100 test cases across 10 modules, running tests, AAA patterns, mock infrastructure, and coverage targets

nodes.name: Code Smell Report
nodes.summary: HTML report of code smell analysis generated by command code tooling

nodes.name: Landing Page Styles
nodes.summary: CSS styles for the public landing page

nodes.name: Global Styles
nodes.summary: Global CSS styles including design tokens, Tailwind imports, glass variants, animations, and utility classes for the Collabryx design system

nodes.name: Grid Scan Styles
nodes.summary: CSS styles for the GridScan component

nodes.name: Logo Loop Styles
nodes.summary: CSS styles for the LogoLoop animation component

nodes.name: Orb Styles
nodes.summary: Minimal CSS styles for the Orb visual component
